"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7442977255633355544","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"剧情在情理之中、意料之外的同时，能不过分混乱跳跃。（也就是不崩）。在同类小说中，是很出类拔萃的存在了。
老书虫都知道，很多小说很优秀，但总是看到某个地方就觉得疲劳，甚至多度看不下去。
但是这本一直到目前都不必担心这种情况。很顺畅，很舒服的节奏。既有情理之中的舒适，又有意料之外的惊喜。适度的跳跃是喜人的，不像有的作品，过度、频繁的跳跃又反而会很出戏。
五星好评，我觉得九分打底是应该的，目前太低分了。
说了这么多……作者，你都休息了好几个小时了，你懂的。[奸笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1732957184,"group_id":"7370158723257355288","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"啥也不想说，低头码字","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/6VfG94ejp2r7JE6FTBTAs=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776875250&x-signature=oRrJGA6Uz5DR%2BfCISt8M%2BfcegOI%3D","user_id":"111103761552","user_name":"梵域龙"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111103761552","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1776839497,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7370158723257355288","book_info":{"abstract":"发明项目：肉鸽高武，属性轮选，永久提升
